subject: fix: address 14 code review findings — bugs, dead code, and deduplication
body:
Critical fixes:
- Fix resetHistory() called without argument in loadDesign (was setting state to undefined)
- Fix applyLayoutPreset not using cleaned textCells fallback; add missing freeformText cleanup
- Fix section alignment loop firing per-cell onLayoutChange (batch into single call)

Bug fixes:
- Fix orientation change listener leak (mismatched add/remove references)
- Fix toRgba/toTransparentRgba corrupting rgba() input into rgbaa()
- Fix ContentTab useMemo dependency [layout.structure] → [layout]
- Add bounds check on selectedCellProp in StyleTab (clamp to valid cell range)
- Fix position labels for 4+ sections (numbered middle labels instead of all "middle")
- Add parseInt radix (10) to all cellUtils parseInt calls

Cleanup:
- Remove dangling imageAspectRatio prop from TemplatesTab
- Remove dead cellInfoList useMemo from StyleTab
- Remove unused newActiveIndex variable in removePage
- Add cellAlignments/cellOverlays to cleanupOrphanedCells utility

Deduplication:
- Extract shared MiniCellGrid component (was duplicated in StyleTab and ContentTab)

Tags: bugfix, cleanup, deduplication, review
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-refactor
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01VxfEgxHMeK2Crn5ZspT6D4
title: address 14 code review findings — bugs, dead code, and deduplication
